designSummary: Add WORKSPACE_ALLOWLIST constant, resolveTargetWorkspace function, and modify handleStartRun to accept optional targetWorkspaceId field. All evidence remains under ForgePilot repo root. OpenCode launched with --dir <resolved workspace path>.
constraintsSatisfied: No arbitrary filesystem paths accepted from request body
No path traversal possible (allowlist key lookup only)
DESIGN_ONLY remains the only supported run mode
Pre-start and post-start evidence recording preserved
targetWorkspaceId and opencodeWorkingDirectory recorded in post-start evidence
